data_description.amap_api_key: Optional. When set, the integration creates an address entity using AMap reverse geocoding.
Optional. Clear this field to stop querying AMap addresses.

abort.already_configured: This Ninebot account is already configured

data.keep_last_data_on_error: Keep last data when updates fail

data_description.amap_api_key: Optional. When set, the integration creates an address entity using AMap reverse geocoding.
data_description.keep_last_data_on_error: Optional. When enabled, entities keep the last successful data if the Ninebot API update fails because of network or service errors. Authentication failures still trigger re-authentication.
data_description.request_delay: Seconds to wait between Ninebot API requests. Defaults to 0 seconds to keep the existing behavior.
data_description.device_delay: Seconds to wait between different vehicles. Defaults to 0 seconds to keep the existing behavior.
